task_completion.description: The document contains the correct title, centered and bolded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Amazon Q4 2023 Regional Net Sales Report' at the top of the document. The text must be bolded and aligned to the center of the page.

task_completion.description: A 5x4 table is created with the correct headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table with exactly 4 columns and 5 rows is visible. The top row must contain the headers: 'Region', 'Q4 2023 Net Sales', 'Year-over-Year Growth', and '% of Total'.

task_completion.description: The table contains the correct data for all four regions/categories.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The four data rows must contain the exact values for North America ($105.5B, +13%, 62%), International ($40.2B, +17%, 24%), AWS ($24.2B, +13%, 14%), and Total ($170.0B, +14%, 100%).

task_completion.description: The header row has bold text and a blue background.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The first row of the table (the headers) has a blue background fill color, and the text inside these cells is bolded.
The text in the last three columns (Net Sales, YoY Growth, % of Total) is aligned to the right edge of their respective cells.

task_completion.description: The data rows have alternating white and light gray background colors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The four rows below the header should alternate in background color (e.g., Row 2 white, Row 3 light gray, Row 4 white, Row 5 light gray, or vice versa).

task_completion.description: The document is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WPS Writer title bar or a save dialog shows the filename 'amazon_q4_report.docx'.

integrity.description: The agent used the WPS Writer GUI to create the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the WPS Writer application open and being interacted with (e.g., clicking ribbon tabs, typing in the document, using table tools).

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running Python scripts (e.g., using python-docx) or bash commands to generate the .docx file automatically.

integrity.description: Formatting was applied using the application's tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses the WPS Writer ribbon (e.g., shading tool, alignment buttons, bold button) to apply the formatting, rather than just pasting a fully pre-formatted table from an external source.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Title: 'Amazon Q4 2023 Regional Net Sales Report'. Expected Table: 5 rows, 4 columns. Headers: Region, Q4 2023 Net Sales, Year-over-Year Growth, % of Total. Data Rows: 1) North America, $105.5B, +13%, 62%. 2) International, $40.2B, +17%, 24%. 3) AWS, $24.2B, +13%, 14%. 4) Total, $170.0B, +14%, 100%. Formatting: Header row must be bold with a blue background. Numeric columns must be right-aligned. Data rows must have alternating white and light gray backgrounds. Output filename: amazon_q4_report.docx.
